mapper.sql: id, user_id, product_id, quantity, selected, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from ws_cart where user_id = #{userId} order by id desc
select from ws_cart where user_id = #{userId} and selected = 1 order by id desc
select from ws_cart where user_id = #{userId} and product_id = #{productId} limit 1
select from ws_cart where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into ws_cart(user_id, product_id, quantity, selected) values (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{selected})
mapper.delete: delete from ws_cart where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
delete from ws_cart where user_id = #{userId} and selected = 1
